metadata.description: Sten Capital's internal Claude plugins for the ayunit / Agnes backoffice — one plugin per Portfolio/Global domain.

plugins.name: account-transaction
plugins.description: Custody activity loaders (UBS Miami, Morgan Stanley, BTG Offshore) plus batch fixers (duplicate-trade-reconcile, compromissada-fix, assetrelated-fix) for Portfolio.AccountTransaction.

plugins.name: position
plugins.description: Position monitoring & reconciliation for Portfolio.v_AccountPosition (book of record) against v_CustodyPosition (broker snapshot). Includes inception-position for seeding the first day of a newly-onboarded account. (Custody↔asset mapping in v_AssetCustody moved to the asset plugin.)

plugins.name: asset
plugins.description: Security-master tools for Global.Asset and Portfolio.AssetCustody on the ayunit MCP. Registration-by-analogy with lookup-validation and duplicate gating. Skills: asset-register, register-br-funds (CNPJ → ANBIMA → asset-register hand-off).

plugins.name: routines
plugins.description: Orchestrator skills (meta-skills) that chain leaf skills from account-transaction and position into daily/weekly backoffice routines. Designed for Claude Cowork Desktop scheduled tasks. First routine: daily-btg-offshore-routine.

plugins.name: anbima-data
plugins.description: ANBIMA data-feed skills for Brazilian investment funds — thin routing layer over the Ayunit MCP (no bundled Python, no credentials). Skills: anbima-funds-data (cadastral registry), anbima-funds-historical-data (NAV/PL/cota series). Cross-surface: Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Claude Cowork.
